name: Beken Corporation
summary: Beken Corporation, a fabless design company, provides IC solutions for wireless applications in China. It offers IC products in the areas of WiFi, Bluetooth BLE, Bluetooth HID, Bluetooth audio SOC, BluetoothHCI, wireless voice, general wireless, broadcast transceiver, and national standard highway toll collection. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
